commit.message:
fix(gym-tracker): pass client timezone to all API routes

Server Lambda runs in UTC, but stored dates are MST. All 7 API routes
that computed "today" server-side now accept ?today= from the client.
Dashboard and reports pages pass the browser's local date via getToday().

commit.message:
Implement relaxed-prompt experiment pipeline (5 scripts + JSON)

- relaxed_prompts.json: all 29 questions, relaxed v1/v2 prompts + subpart defs
- 00_label_relaxed_v2.py: run 9B on hard questions with relaxed v2 prompt (29.5k calls)
- 01_make_train_test.py: 80/20 stratified splits; skips missing v2 labels gracefully
- 02_embedding_threshold.py: cosine sim threshold tuning + AND combination vs v2 ground truth
- 03_train_slm_subparts.py: ModernBERT-base + LoRA binary classifier per question
- 04_compare.py: embedding vs SLM comparison table + summary by construct type

fix: increase element-web task memory_mb from 2048 to 8192

suite, causing the verifier to be OOM-killed on every baseline attempt.
With 8GB the task completes successfully (score 1.0).

Display p-values grid (P&L t-test, win rate binomial, Sharpe and profit

overall significance badge with star rating, and low trade count warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.1.17 — TDD fidelity: TC given/when/then to Phase 4 + debug mode + verify notes gate

- extractTestIndex now includes given/when/then/scenario/expected_result/user_story_id/ac_id
  so Developer LLM implements against exact test contracts, not inferred behavior
- phase4 buildBriefing: renamed "Test Index" → "Test Specs", added guidance to implement
  exactly to each TC's given/when/then
- phase4 buildBriefing: debug mode section auto-activated when failingTests present —
  lists failing TCs with error notes and instructs minimal targeted fix
- run-phase: auto-reads 04_TEST_RESULTS.json when phase 4; injects failing entries as
  failingTests without requiring --feedback
- verify: briefing now requires notes to contain actual test runner output for fail/skip
- verify-complete: blocks if failing TCs have empty notes (hides root cause)
- 182 tests passing (4 new tests added)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix double task creation in Timeline add-task input

onSubmitEditing and onBlur both called handleSubmit, so pressing
done added the task twice. Now onBlur just clears without adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix chromedp tests failing in CI by verifying Chrome can launch

skipIfNoChrome previously only checked if a Chrome binary existed on
PATH. CI runners have Chrome installed but chromedp fails to connect
via DevTools protocol, causing websocket timeout errors. Now the skip
function actually attempts to launch Chrome and navigate to about:blank,
skipping the test if that fails.

commit.message:
fix: reduce MAX_CONTENT_CHARS 200K→80K for 32K token context

Korean text tokenizes at ~1-2 chars/token (vs ~4 for English), so
200K chars was producing 32K+ tokens and hitting context length errors.
80K chars safely fits within the 32768 token budget.

Add 2-minute cache to getAllPostsWithImages for faster calendar loading

Cache is invalidated on any create, update, or approval action so data
stays fresh. Significantly reduces Sheets API calls on repeated loads.

feat: batch 2 steps 4-9 — thank-you pages, templates, submissions, validation, analytics, A/B testing

Step 4 — Thank-you page builder:
- ThankYouPageConfig type in shared (heading, text, button, offer, script blocks)
- ThankYouRenderer component renders blocks after form submission
- ThankYouBuilder component for editing thank-you page config
- Integrated into FormRenderer — shows custom thank-you page when configured

Step 5 — Template library:
- Template model in Prisma schema with vertical tags
- Templates API module (CRUD + use-template to create form from template)
- 5 starter templates seeded: solar, insurance, mortgage, home services, real estate

Step 6 — Submissions backend:
- Enhanced FormSubmission with idempotencyKey, variantId, ip, userAgent, consentTimestamp, formVersion
- Idempotency check on submit endpoint
- Admin submissions list endpoint with pagination and date filtering

Step 7 — Email/phone validation:
- Validation API module with email regex and phone format validators
- ValidationMeter model for usage tracking per org/month
- Validate endpoint returns allow/warn/block status

Step 8 — Analytics event tracking:
- AnalyticsEvent model with indexes for formId, sessionId, type, createdAt
- Track and batch-track endpoints (public, non-blocking)
- Form analytics aggregation: visits, starts, submissions, step funnel, conversion rate
- Client-side analytics lib with 2-second batched event buffer
- FormRenderer wired with visit, form_start, step_view, step_submit, validation_fail, submit_success events

Step 9 — A/B testing:
- FormVariant model with weighted traffic splitting
- Variants API module (CRUD + weighted random assignment)
- Public assign endpoint for runtime variant selection

commit.message:
Fix 4 bugs: sync off-by-one, DB error handling, URL resolution, SQL escaping

- Incremental sync: use < instead of <= for updated_date boundary to
  avoid skipping jobs at the exact boundary timestamp
- Pipeline worker: wrap mark_applied/mark_excluded in try/except to
  prevent DB errors from killing the worker
- URL resolution: distinguish simplify.jobs redirects (no external URL,
  delete) from network failures (transient, exclude)
- SQL filter builder: escape single quotes in YAML filter values to
  prevent SQL syntax errors

Add EIP-712 DepositIntent signing to all deposit flows

- config.ts: export shared DEPOSIT_INTENT_DOMAIN and DEPOSIT_INTENT_TYPES
  constants (name: Cairo, verifyingContract, chainId 11155111n) so all
  components stay in sync with the backend

- DepositMethodModal: remove inline domain/types (now from config), fix
  endpoint /api/transfer/create → /api/plaid/transfer/deposit, rename
  timestamp field to intentTimestamp to match backend

- Banking (TransferForm): import useSignTypedData; sign DepositIntent before
  deposit; withdraw remains unsigned

commit.message:
fix: Handle scalar JSONB values in normalize migration

Some cost_centres rows have scalar JSONB values (not arrays) in
sm_schedule_master_template_ids. Fix by resetting scalars to empty
arrays before attempting jsonb_array_elements.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add conditional logic engine, form runtime renderer, and publishing

- Add logic engine in shared package with condition evaluation, step
  branching, and visibility rules (supports equals, not_equals, contains,
  greater_than, less_than, is_empty operators)
- Create Forms API module with CRUD, publish/unpublish, public form
  serving, step evaluation, and submission endpoints
- Build form runtime renderer with multi-step navigation, progress bar,
  client-side validation, animated transitions, and UTM tracking
- Add rule builder UI for step branching logic and conditional visibility
- Add form hosting at /forms/[id] with embed support (iframe + postMessage
  height resizing)
- Update Prisma schema with slug and version fields on Form model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(core, desktop): launch env isolation, imported sessions, macOS permissions (#43)

* chore: use ~/.mainframe_dev data dir for development

Separate dev data directory from production (~/.mainframe) to prevent
interference when running both simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): isolate launch process env and restore state on reload

- Replace blocklist env strategy with allowlist in cleanEnv() — only
  essential OS/user vars (PATH, HOME, SHELL, LANG, etc.) are passed to
  launched processes. Prevents NODE_ENV=production leak from Electron
  that broke Vite dev mode (_jsxDEV not a function).
- Fix fetchLaunchStatuses response parsing — was treating the outer
  { statuses, tunnelUrls } object as the statuses map, so launch state
  was never restored after CMD+R reload.
- Add whitespace-pre-wrap and select-text to console output so newlines
  render correctly and text can be highlighted/copied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): imported sessions, plan paths, ghost mentions, macOS permissions

- Remap chatId on history messages loaded from disk — loadHistory embeds
  the Claude session UUID, not the Mainframe chat ID
- Filter ghost entries from sessions-index.json — verify JSONL file
  exists on disk before listing importable sessions
- Resolve plan file paths to absolute — CLI stores relative paths in
  toolUseResult.filePath, causing "Failed to load file" in the editor
- Allow file reads from ~/.claude/ via resolveClaudeConfigPath fallback
  in the files route (plan files live outside the project root)
- Skip mention extraction on command/skill injection messages to prevent
  false @-mentions from template text (e.g. @scope/pkg in /launch-config)
- Suppress macOS Apple Music/camera/mic permission prompts by nulling
  electron-builder's default media plist keys and adding a session-level
  permission request handler that denies media/sensor access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add developer toolchain vars to launch env allowlist

JAVA_HOME, ANDROID_HOME, GOPATH, CARGO_HOME, RUSTUP_HOME, PYENV_ROOT,
NVM_DIR, VOLTA_HOME, BUN_INSTALL, DENO_DIR, DOTNET_ROOT, GRADLE_HOME,
MAVEN_HOME, M2_HOME — needed for ./gradlew, Go, Rust, Python, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core, desktop): resolve login-shell env and relative executables

- Replace resolveShellPath() with resolveShellEnv() — runs `env` in the
  login shell to capture JAVA_HOME, SDKMAN vars, ANDROID_HOME, etc.
  that Electron's GUI-launched process.env doesn't include
- Resolve relative executables (./gradlew, ./mvnw) against the project
  directory before spawning — Node's spawn only searches PATH, not cwd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): add access() mock to external sessions test

The access() check added to skip ghost index entries needs a
corresponding mock so tests with sessions-index.json pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Messaging UX + rename Restaurant to Place (#38)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 3 Xcode build errors: Nuke API and actor isolation

- Remove isDeduplicationEnabled (not in this Nuke version, on by default)
- Simplify LazyImage in RestaurantDetailView to avoid main-actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add @MainActor to coverImageSection to fix actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Inline cover image LazyImage to fix actor isolation cascade

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 400 error: auto-create restaurant when place has no DB match

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 4 issues: feed crash, video unmute, comments, shimmer placeholders

- Fix durationSecs decimal→string crash by adding TypeORM transformer
- Fix video unmute button swallowed by NavigationLink (.buttonStyle)
- Fix comments not loading: send page/perPage instead of limit param
- Add Instagram-style shimmer loading placeholders for images/video

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ShimmerView.swift to Xcode project to fix CI build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add multi-image carousel, profile error states, pull-to-refresh, dark mode toggle

- MediaCarouselView: swipeable TabView with page dots for multi-image posts
- PostCardView: replace single image + "+X more" with full carousel
- ProfileView: add .refreshable, error state with retry via EmptyStateView
- AppearanceManager: system/light/dark mode with @AppStorage persistence
- SettingsView: segmented picker for appearance mode
- InvlogApp: wire AppearanceManager with .preferredColorScheme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add social features: bookmarks, share, stories, and DMs

Backend (NestJS):
- BookmarksModule: bookmark/unbookmark posts, list saved posts (cursor paginated)
- StoriesModule: create story from media, 24h expiry feed grouped by user,
  mark viewed, viewer list, delete — with batch author+view hydration
- MessagesModule: conversations (lexicographic participant pair), send messages,
  cursor-paginated message threads, mark-as-read, unread counts
- Register all 3 modules in AppModule; add isBookmarkedByMe to Post entity
- New DB tables: bookmarks, stories, story_views, conversations, messages

iOS (SwiftUI):
- PostCardView: bookmark button (filled/unfilled), share button with ShareSheetView
- BookmarksView + BookmarksViewModel: saved posts list with pagination
- ProfileView: "Saved Posts" navigation link for current user
- StoriesBarView: horizontal avatar scroll with gradient ring (unviewed) at feed top
- StoryViewerView: full-screen viewer with progress bars, tap nav, swipe dismiss
- StoriesViewModel: load story feed, mark as viewed
- ConversationsListView: inbox with avatar, preview, timestamp, unread badge
- MessageThreadView: chat bubbles (blue/gray), text input, 5s polling
- NewConversationView: user search to start DM
- FeedView: stories bar as first section, paperplane toolbar icon → DMs
- 14 new Swift files added to project.pbxproj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 5 Swift compile errors: add responseType param, iOS 16 compat

- StoriesViewModel: add responseType: [StoryGroup].self to request call
- MessageThreadViewModel: add responseType: Message.self to sendMessage call
- NewConversationView: add responseType to search and startConversation calls
- NewConversationView: replace iOS 17 navigationDestination(item:) with
  navigationDestination(isPresented:) for iOS 16 compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Messaging UX improvements and rename Restaurant to Place

- Add Message button on other users' profiles (ProfileView)
- Show followed users by default in NewConversationView
- Rename all user-facing "Restaurant" text to "Place" across 8 views
